value: {"action_id": "novel_cast_vote_silent_phase_out", "description": "Tim Cook casts an internal vote to initiate silent phase-out of Vision Pro, reallocate engineering resources to AI features in iOS/macOS, and signal to analysts that Apple is prioritizing high-margin Services and AI.", "actor_ids": ["tim_cook"], "authority_required": [], "targets": ["apple_board"], "effects": [{"kind": "record_vote", "params": {"institution_id": "apple_board", "options": ["approve_phase_out"], "stage": "decision", "key": "vote_tim_cook", "value": "approve_phase_out"}}, {"kind": "set_state", "params": {"institution_id": "apple_engineering", "options": [], "stage": "", "key": "vision_pro_phase_out", "value": "silent_start"}}, {"kind": "set_state", "params": {"institution_id": "apple_engineering", "options": [], "stage": "", "key": "ai_ios_macos_priority", "value": "high"}}], "emits_events": [{"etype": "internal_vote_cast", "observers": ["apple_board"]}], "writes_terminal": false, "validation": ""}
